functions.description: Returns a live-streaming price field for the given ticker.
functions.name: LIVEPRICE

parameters.description: The ticker key (e.g. "cc1", "usd-jpy") or security ID (e.g. "CCH6", "USDJPY").
parameters.name: ticker

parameters.description: The field to return: MID, BID, ASK, LAST_PRICE, OPEN, HIGH, LOW, VOLUME.
parameters.name: field

functions.description: Returns a list of all available data fields for a ticker.
functions.name: FIELDS

parameters.description: The ticker key (e.g. "cc1", "usd-jpy") or security ID (e.g. "CCH6", "USDJPY").
parameters.name: ticker

functions.description: Returns a list of all commodity tickers currently streaming (e.g., CC1, USDJPY).
functions.name: TICKERS
